TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit ContentRange extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentRange>
Public Structure ContentRange Implements IEquatable(Of ContentRange)

Docs.summary:
Represents a range of content to analyze. Use this type with the
method for a self-documenting API.
For documents, ranges use 1-based page numbers (e.g., "1-3", "5", "9-"). For audio/video, ranges use integer milliseconds (e.g., "0-5000", "5000-"). Multiple ranges can be combined with commas (e.g., "1-3,5,9-").

Docs.summary: Combines multiple values into a single comma-separated range.
Docs.returns: A representing the combined ranges, e.g. "1-3,5,9-".

Docs.summary: Creates a for a single document page (1-based).
Docs.returns: A representing the single page, e.g. "5".

Docs.summary: Creates a for a contiguous range of document pages (1-based, inclusive).
Docs.returns: A representing the page range, e.g. "1-3".
Docs.exception: is less than 1, or is less than .

Docs.summary: Creates a for all document pages from a starting page to the end (1-based).
Docs.returns: A representing the open-ended page range, e.g. "9-".
